title: The Island’s Secrets Push Forward
description: On pages 7–9, this part follows Unknown person #7, Gunko, Unknown person #8, Usopp, Nami, Unknown person #9 as Elbaf’s present-day danger converges on the Straw Hats, Loki, and the giants as the island’s history and World Government pressure collide.
scene: Elbaf’s present-day danger converges on the Straw Hats, Loki, and the giants as the island’s history and World Government pressure collide.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I'm free!!

dialogue.speaker: Gunko
dialogue.text: Gunko!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Brook... I'm!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Thou attempted to move of thine own will?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Ooh!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: AAAAH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Drat!! My leg got stuck again!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Why did you tell me to run!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I came to settle this matter!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Now, who are you?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: glare!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Shut thy mouth!!!

dialogue.speaker: Gunko
dialogue.text: Who art thou to gunko?!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Branch Eight - USOPP's GROUP

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: whooo!! we're finally free!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: My mind powers did the trick, y'see?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The arrows came loose for a moment... what happened?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Robin's restrants are different!! We have to get these thorns off her!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Forget me, Nami, focus on the children!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I saw ange slip away earlier, but I doubt she'll make it in time.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: West Village is way too far.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Nami-Swaaaaa AAAAAAN!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Sanji-KUN!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Branch Eight - NEAR WEST VILLAGE

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: GIHA ha ha ha! Keep moving, you brats!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: The finish line is just over there!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're one of the demons Elder Jarul mentioned, aren't you?!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll make you pay for this!! Elbaf is really strong. You'll see!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: moron. We know all about how strong giants are; that's why we're after you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You're Gyaban's Kid, Right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'd shut up and unwrap these thorns if I were you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Yeah!! Let us go!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I DARE YOU TO FACE US LIKE A WARRIOR!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: GIHA HA!! You're a real hoot!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: It's way too late for that.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Look!! I can already see the harbor!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Say goodbye to your Homeland!! this is the last time you'll ever see it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What?!! No way!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You mean I'll never see MA and PA again?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I don't want that!! Someone help us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Ahem, Hello? Great one?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Qilingam and I are about to complete our task...

summary: This part advances Elbaf’s Crisis Reaches the Straw Hats through 42 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
